name: Handheld Camera
author: Morphoice
description: Smooth handheld camera sway and screen shake effect. Applies randomized, eased offsets to scroll_offset_x/scroll_offset_y to simulate organic camera movement. Configurable amplitude (0-8px per axis), speed (5 presets from slow drift to raw shake), and smoothness (4 levels). Uses 8.8 fixed-point math for sub-pixel easing. Independent X/Y axis control — disable either axis by setting amplitude to 0.
